metadata.description: Local marketplace for the Gemma plugin — Claude Code consultation helpers backed by local Ollama models.

plugins.name: gemma
plugins.description: Delegate cheap consultations (explanations, rubber-duck debugging, boilerplate, second opinions) to a local gemma4 model via Ollama. Zero-cost, zero-quota, runs fully offline. Complements the gemini plugin — gemma is the Haiku-tier consultant, not an agent.
